demo.title: demo.sh
demo.code:
# Scan a Solana memecoin for honeypot / rug risk (x402, $0.015 USDC on Base or Solana)
curl -sS "https://onchainpulse-nine.vercel.app/api/memecoin?mint=DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263"
# -> HTTP 402 with accepts[]; pay from your Bankr wallet and retry to get:
# { "verdict": "CLEAR|CAUTION|AVOID", "risk_score": 7, "evidence": [...] }

setup: No API key or signup — pay per call in USDC.
Fund your Bankr wallet with USDC on Base (Solana also accepted).
Call any endpoint; on HTTP 402, pay the advertised amount and retry. Browse all 67 verticals at https://mcp-pulsenetwork.vercel.app
